creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
While investigating graphics/tesseract bustage in bug 234285 (both version currently in ports and update), found some possible silliness in autotools configure generation. May be worth looking into since some ports that use autotools don't come with a pre-generated configure script, like graphics/tesseract.

https://github.com/tesseract-ocr/tesseract/issues/2344#issuecomment-475963512
